title: polygala amara
intro: Polygala amara, also known as bitter milkwort, is a perennial plant in the milkwort family (Polygalaceae) native to Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating cough and respiratory issues, and supporting kidney function. In herbal preparations, Polygala amara can be consumed as a tea, tincture, or infused in hot water to utilize its medicinal properties.
